questions.question: What is 2 + 2?
questions.solution: 2 + 2 equals 4, so the last option is correct.

questions.question: Which planet is known as the Red Planet?
questions.solution: Mars is called the Red Planet because of iron oxide on its surface.

questions.question: Is the Earth flat?
questions.solution: The Earth is an oblate spheroid — roughly spherical but slightly flattened at the poles.
